title: AmongPlus
description: ! IN BETA ! Are you wanted to play Minecraft with beans? This mod adds things from the game Among Us!
body:
Among Us is back in Minecraft!  This mod will add blocks, items, mobs, dimensions, bosses, mechanics, structures and more!
- In beta. Report bugs -[https://t.me/amongplus_offical](https://t.me/amongplus_offical)
## <iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/jewtZDFx7Y4" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
## Geckolib is required for the mod to work - [https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib)

# In mod:
- Many new blocks and items
- Works in survival mode
- 60+ mobs
- Impostors, beans, dead bodies of beans
- 2 new dimensions: The Fungle and Polus
- 2 new bosses: Red Amogus and Indigo
- New profession of villager
- Food
- 3 new structures
- And more!

### Telegram - [https://t.me/amongplus_offical](https://t.me/amongplus_offical)
### YouTube Ilplay - [https://youtube.com/@ilplay](https://youtube.com/@ilplay)
### YouTube Farmi - [https://youtube.com/@farmin54](https://youtube.com/@farmin54)
